Operation.xpath: /Defs/PawnKindDef[defName="Empire_Common_Trader" or defName="Empire_Fighter_Grenadier" or defName="Empire_Fighter_Janissary" or defName="Empire_Fighter_Champion" or defName="Empire_Fighter_Cataphract" or @Name="StellicGuardBase" or defName="Empire_Royal_NobleWimp" or defName="Empire_Royal_Yeoman" or defName="Empire_Royal_Acolyte" or defName="Empire_Royal_Knight" or defName="Empire_Royal_Praetor" or defName="Empire_Royal_Baron" or defName="Empire_Royal_Count" or defName="Empire_Royal_Duke" or defName="Empire_Royal_Consul" or defName="Empire_Royal_Stellarch" or defName="Empire_Royal_Bestower"]/xenotypeSet
